heading: Administration of acquired lands
label: 666e Administration of acquired lands
text: Any lands acquired by the Secretary of the Interior under the terms of this section and , if located within or adjacent to an existing wildlife refuge or reservation, immediately shall become a part of such refuge or reservation and shall be administered under the laws and regulations applicable thereto, and, if not so located, may be administered as a migratory-waterfowl management area, refuge, reservation, or breeding ground in accordance with the provisions of the Act of (), and Acts supplementary thereto.section 666d of this title60 Stat. 1080August 14, 1946
notes: References in TextThe Act of , referred to in text, is , , which amended , by generally amending sections 1 to 6, which are classified to sections 661 to 665 and 666 of this title, and by adding sections 7 to 9, which are classified to sections 666a to 666c of this title. Subsequent acts added sections 5A and 10 of act , which are classified to sections 665a and 666c–1 of this title, respectively.August 14, 1946Mar. 10, 1934act Aug. 14, 1946, ch. 96560 Stat. 1080act Mar. 10, 1934, ch. 55
